chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 37 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.01.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Shahzaib, Advocate along with Applicant Complainant present in person Ms. Sana Memon APG The applicant is neither nominated in the FIR nor has she been identified by the Complainant. Complainant present in court says that there was a lady with the main accused who was wearing Naqab. No identification parade was held. Today also Complainant on seeing the applicant says that the lady was in Naqab hence cannot say that it is the same lady. The name of applicant was first introduced in this case on 28.7.2025 which is more than three months after the incident and how she was identified is not clear. In view of above the case against her is of further inquiry; therefore, the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to her is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
